name: 2025 Annual HVAC Tune-Up Program - All Properties
description: Annual HVAC preventive maintenance tune-up on all 127 owned units and 43 managed units. Cool Comfort AC & Heating performing 170 tune-ups at $220/unit average. Filter changes coil cleaning and refrigerant check. Coordinated with tenants for access during March-April before peak summer season.

Remote monitoring reduces HVAC service calls improves tenant experience and allows vacancy monitoring. Installed by in-house maintenance coordinators.

name: Pest Control Annual Program - All 127 Units
description: Annual pest control program for all 127 owned properties. Sunstate Pest Control quarterly treatments for scorpions ants cockroaches and termite inspection. Desert Southwest pest pressure requires consistent program. Tenants notified 24 hours in advance per AZ landlord-tenant law.

description: Onboarding 12 new SFR homes from investor James Whitfield into our management platform. Properties in Mesa and Gilbert. Included property condition inspections for all 12 units lease audit and tenant communication transition. Set up owner portal in AppFolio.

completion_pct: 850/home average. Work sequenced around tenant schedules. Winter months optimal for exterior work.
